PRIMARY TEXT IN CORPUS (S7i). Res. No. 130-11 s.2023 (authors Cllrs Agustin & Rustia, approved 19-Jun-2023) adopts PCDRRMC Res. No.1 s.2023 approving LDRRMP 2023-2028; cites RA 10121 §12(c)(6) + IRR Rule 6 §4(7); records the 2017-2022 plan was revisited and updated (update cycle documented). Res. No. 269-11 s.2023 (approved 06-Dec-2023) adopts PCDRRMC Res. No.9 s.2023 approving EQ Contingency Plan 2024-2026. Committee Report 07-Jun-2023: plan ~300pp, target zero casualties at M7.2.
Ord. No. 02 s.2015 creates PCDRRMO w/ 26 primary functions + full plantilla (LDRRM Officer IV SG22 down to I SG11) + initial appropriation P4370188.44; repeals prior Ord. 18 s.2010.

MAPS LIMB SATISFIED: Joint PHIVOLCS Marker Project - physical ground markers, signs, paint lines on public roads marking the WVF trace; one of only 3 NCR LGUs (w/ QC & Makati) per PHIVOLCS head Solidum (Inquirer 19-May-2015, verified S7h). PLANS LIMB NOT SATISFIED (S7k): LDRRMP 2023-2028 (~300pp) is NOT published as a standalone download on pasigcity.gov.ph, despite the Sanggunian Committee on Disaster Resilience directive of 07-Jun-2023 that it be made 'down loadable thru Pasig City website/platform' for barangays and constituents. Actual channel is the PCDRRMO Citizen's Charter document-request service: formal letter to Mayor or PCDRRMO Chief + valid government ID + personal USB drive (min 5GB), free of charge, in person at Research & Planning Division. IRR Rule 6 §7 requires maps AND plans publicly displayed.

Documented WVF risk assessment: ~100km dextral strike-slip fault, 10-12mm/yr slip, M7.2-7.6 potential. Directly-affected barangays named: Ugong, Bagong Ilog, San Joaquin, Kalawaan, Kapitolyo, Manggahan. Liquefaction PEIS VIII+ high-risk zones: Ugong, Kapitolyo, Manggahan (alluvium/deltaic sands). MMEIRS-based (same as loss model).

PRIMARY (S7i): Res. 269-11 s.2023 EQ Contingency Plan 2024-2026 is on its face subject to periodical revisions/enhancement. Citizen's Charter documents PCDRRMO drill-evaluator services for schools/private entities/barangays. Historical: Ord. 08-08 s.2016 drill mandate UNVERIFIED - see S7i note.
